context: Post-regression clearance, provider risk verified, local-only mode

top_5_actions_updated.description: Reduce overspecialization via new artifact categories
Migrate from Anthropic to alternative provider — requires T1 approval
Improve cost monitoring with ceiling filter

selected_artifacts_for_surge_003.name: t1_decision_pack_compiler_v0_1.py
selected_artifacts_for_surge_003.rationale: Highest T1 value — compiles all signals into a single decision pack for T1, reducing manual synthesis. Directly serves PRODUCE_NEXT_SURGE and UPGRADE_OPS_LAYER.

selected_artifacts_for_surge_003.name: regression_false_positive_filter_v0_1.py
selected_artifacts_for_surge_003.rationale: Directly addresses the regression investigation finding — prevents future false positives from fixture ceiling values. Serves ADDRESS_COST_DRIFT and reduces noise.

selected_artifacts_for_surge_003.name: provider_risk_local_blocker_v0_1.py
selected_artifacts_for_surge_003.rationale: Enforces the provider risk constraint programmatically — blocks any operation that would require provider calls. Critical safety artifact given Anthropic risk status.
